fullText:
Mad Montanha (Portuguese for Mad Mountain) is a steel roller coaster with wooden supports located at Acqualokos in Capão da Canoa, Rio Grande do Sul, Brazil. It was designed and built by the park, and opened in 2003. For the 2005 season, the track was extended by.

The ride has three drops and a 360 degree helix.

The ride uses trains similar to that of a Big Apple roller coaster.
